authority.owner_direction: Apply current ChatGPT Plus capabilities across all ELEMENTARY work and determine whether the overall plan requires update.

decision.master_plan_version_effect: 1.0.0 plus this canonical subordinate alignment; consolidate into the next planned master revision

global_application.work: Preferred for multi-stage deliverables, cross-app synthesis and document/presentation/spreadsheet/report creation when account-visible.
global_application.codex: Preferred for bounded repository coding, testing and review under branch/worktree, PR and CI rules.
global_application.scheduled_tasks: Preferred for recurring informational delivery and condition monitoring that does not duplicate ADCP lifecycle authority.
global_application.plugins_and_apps: Use least privilege and explicit confirmation for external writes; verify plan, region and connection.
global_application.deep_research: Use for source-restricted cited research; connected-app actions remain read-only.
global_application.projects_memory_custom_gpts: Use for continuity and reusable working context, never as canonical truth.
global_application.browser_vision_files: Use for evidence review and UI/document/image analysis with provenance and rights controls.
global_application.record_voice_video: Use for intake and meeting assistance; require explicit promotion receipt before canonicalization.
global_application.sites_canvas: Use for bounded prototypes when visible; no production publication without separate acceptance.
